title: Unidentified Human Jedi (Beyghor Sahdett)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Escaping_Jedi_SW79.jpg]] |name=Unidentified Human Jedi |homeworld= |birth= |death=c. [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]][[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]] is set a few [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the events of {{Film|III}}, which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. Therefore, ''A Spark Remains'' 3 and its flashbacks, which also take place after ''Revenge of the Sith'' and depict the [[Death/Legends|death]] of the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], must be set around 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] as well. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] |gender= |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Dark red]][[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]] |feathers= |eyes=Green |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I can't see her!''"
"''Over there I think!|Clone troopers, as the Human Jedi evades them|}} A '''Human Jedi''' served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] survived the initial execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] commanding [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to [[Death/Legends|execute]] the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. She evaded the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] she was accompanying by taking advantage of the fog where she was stationed. Eventually she was among several Jedi who were captured and brought to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], alias the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] Darth Sidious, who gave them [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] and encouraged them to [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] each other. The Jedi instead attacked Sidious, who killed all of them except for her and the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] Jedi [[Beyghor Sahdett]]. Sahdett, overpowered by his awe and fear of Sidious, then turned on the Jedi and killed her. ==Biography== {{Quote|If you had been there, if you had ''seen''…you would have done what I did. You ''would'' have done the same! You might still!|Beyghor Sahdett to Jedi Master Kai Hudorra, on allying with the Sith and killing the Human Jedi|}} [[File:Swonrep79p2.jpg|thumb|left|300px|The Jedi evades capture.]] A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] lived during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], which began in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' alongside [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], during which the prologue of [[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] is set, to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. the Jedi was with a [[Squad/Legends|squad]] of [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] in a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] near a set of ruins. Her [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], which was a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|directive]] commanding the Republic forces to [[Death/Legends|execute]] the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] as traitors. When the clones attacked the Jedi, she managed to evade them due to the extremely thick fog, which prevented them from locating her position and killing her. Around 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], she, alongside four other Jedi, including the [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] [[Beyghor Sahdett]], was eventually captured, starved and beaten. Soon, the Jedi were brought before [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine himself, whom they recognized to be a [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]], Darth Sidious. The Emperor handed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] to the Jedi and her fellow [[Prisoner/Legends|captives]], encouraging them to [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] one another for the right to survive under his rule. The Jedi had not given in to fear, however, and attacked the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] as one, yet Sidious' prowess with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and a lightsaber allowed him to kill three of the Jedi in an instant. She and Sahdett were the only two left standing, shocked at how quickly their compatriots had been slaughtered. Sahdett, however, enraptured by awe and fear of Sidious' power, turned on the Jedi and rammed his blade through her [[Stomach/Legends|stomach]], killing her. Around that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], when Sahdett—who had become an agent of the Sith—was later captured by surviving [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Kai Hudorra]], he attempted to justify his actions by explaining the encounter with Palpatine where he killed the human Jedi. ==Personality and traits== [[File:WWJediDeath.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Jedi is killed by Beyghor Sahdett.]] The Jedi was light-skinned with [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and dark red [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. Along with the other captive Jedi, she refused for them to duel each other upon Darth Sidious' encouragement, and instead attacked the Sith Lord, though they were no match for Sidious' power. ==Powers and abilities== The Jedi was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and was able to escape being executed during the initial stages of Order 66. ==Equipment== The Jedi wore a set of brown and gray [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robes]] and owned a blue lightsaber. She also adorned her forehead with a simple tiara containing a red [[Stone/Legends|stone]] at its center. At the time of her capture, she was wearing a different tiara, with a [[Silver/Legends|silver]] stone at the center. ==Behind the scenes== The Jedi first appeared in the [[Republic 79|seventy-ninth]] issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[Randy Stradley]] under the pseudonym "Welles Hartley," penciled by [[Douglas Wheatley]], and released on [[November 9]], [[2005]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/10-446/Star-Wars-Republic-79|text=STAR WARS: REPUBLIC #79}} She later reappeared in [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]], a comic authored by Stradley and published on [[September 18]], [[2013]],{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/22-249/Star-Wars-Dark-Times-A-Spark-Remains-3|text=STAR WARS: DARK TIMES—A SPARK REMAINS #3}} with a somewhat different appearance. Nonetheless, Stradley confirmed it was indeed the same character, and her addition to that comic was in response to some fans' thoughts of too many surviving Jedi in the ''Republic'' comic series.{{DHBoards|url=viewtopic.php?f=1&t=21165|thread=Wonder Woman Jedi|user=[[Randy Stradley]]|date=2013-09-29|time=11:20 pm}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of unidentified Human Jedi (Beyghor Sahdett)}} *[[Republic 79|''Republic'' 79]] {{1st}} {{Flash}} *[[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 3|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 3]] {{Flash}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi]]
